    L

    labels - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
     
    lastUpdateTime - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    LEFT - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity.Direction
     
    level - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Level - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    Level encapsulates the game level, including its layout, chunks, and spawn positions.
    Level(String, ChunkManager) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Level
    Constructs a Level by loading level data from a file.
    Level(ArrayList<Chunk>, int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Level
    Constructs a Level using a pre-built list of chunks and explicit dimensions.
    LEVEL_EXTERNAL_PATH - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.LevelManager
     
    LEVEL_RESOURCE_PATH - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.LevelManager
     
    LevelGenerator - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    LevelGenerator is responsible for procedurally generating game levels.
    LevelGenerator() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.LevelGenerator
     
    LevelGenerator.AbstractLevel - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    Contains info on what doors the individual chunks have, without any information on chunks
    LevelGenerator.ChunkToPlace - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    ChunkToPlace encapsulates the position and door configuration for a chunk placement.
    levelGraph - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    LevelGraph - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.levelGraph
     
    LevelGraph(Level) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.levelGraph.LevelGraph
    LevelGraph represents a graph structure built on the game level.
    levelManager - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    LevelManager - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    LevelManager is responsible for discovering and loading level files.
    LevelManager() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.LevelManager
    Creates a new LevelManager instance.
    LevelNode - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.levelGraph
    LevelNode represents a single node in the level graph.
    LevelNode(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.levelGraph.LevelNode
    Constructs a LevelNode with the specified coordinates.
    loadGeneralSettings() - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Utils
    Loads general settings from the settings file
    loadLevel(String, ChunkManager) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.LevelManager
    Loads a level given its name.
    logger - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.TextureManager
     
    logManager - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    LOS - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
